case_title: KALAYLA ANDREA JONES VS. ISACC NGUYEN ET AL

CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE 68608 (B) AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING FEB-06-2018 AT 10:30 AM. THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-08-2018 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: There being no appearance nor an objection filed and notice having been given, the Court ordered case dismissed pursuant to Government Code 68608 (b). Judge: A. James Robertson, II; Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-08-2017 Continued To Feb-06-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set February 6, 2018 at 10:30 am, in Department 610. Judge: Suzanne R. Bolanos; Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Proceedings not reported. (610)
